conversion_sew_policy_boundary.authority: provider-derived typed tcrv_rvv conversion body/config/runtime facts
conversion_sew_policy_boundary.source: typed tcrv_rvv widening conversion body/config -> RVV realization -> route-family facts -> math operand-binding facts -> RVV-owned statement plan -> emitted widening conversion intrinsics

harness.boundary: external C ABI consumer of generated header and object only
harness.conversion_sign_extension_contract: two signed i32 input patterns cover mixed-sign values, wide-magnitude int32 values beyond i16 range, expected i64 sign-extension, and output tail sentinel preservation

compile.command: ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 rvv 'sh -lc '"'"'cd /tmp/tianchenrv_rvv_generated_bundle_abi_widen-i32-hw_widen_i32_to_i64 && printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'remote_arch='"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' && uname -m && printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'clang_path='"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' && command -v clang && printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'clang_version='"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' && clang --version | head -n 1 && clang -O2 -march=rv64gcv -mabi=lp64d -I. /tmp/tianchenrv_rvv_generated_bundle_abi_widen-i32-hw_widen_i32_to_i64/rvv_generated_bundle_abi_widen_i32_to_i64_harness.c /tmp/tianchenrv_rvv_generated_bundle_abi_widen-i32-hw_widen_i32_to_i64/artifact-0-riscv-elf-relocatable-object-rvv-generic-typed-body-emitc-route-family.o -o /tmp/tianchenrv_rvv_generated_bundle_abi_widen-i32-hw_widen_i32_to_i64/rvv_generated_bundle_abi_widen_i32_to_i64_harness'"'"''
